channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Argentina Must Show Grit Against Switzerland –Scaloni
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Argentina coach Lionel Scaloni has disclosed that the team must show more grit if they are to defeat Switzerland in the quarter-final of the FIFA World Cup 2026. The defending champions are facing resilient opposition in Kansas City but remain driven by their head coach’s emotional call for to

item.title: 2027: NSCDC Commandant seeks collective action against electoral violence, drug abuse
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Commandant of the Nigeria Security and Civil Defence Corps (NSCDC), Federal Capital Territory (FCT) Command, Dr Olusola Odumosu, has called for collective action and stronger collaboration among government institutions, security agencies, academia, youths, civil society organisations and other s

item.title: Morning and afternoon session highlights: India in complete control at tea
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Highlights of the morning and afternoon sessions on day two of the Women's Test between England and India.

item.title: The U.S. stock market is becoming ‘too big to fail’
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Why protracted bear markets may be a thing of the past.

item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Charles Ajunwa Lagos Continental Hotel has entered into a strategic partnership with DGIC International Business Services Limited to support youth development through practical hospitality training, reinforcing a shared commitment to

item.title: Incredible sequence! Comical drop catch, huge Brook six AND superb fan catch!
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Shivam Dube fails to make a catch in comical fashion, which is then followed by a six by captain Harry Brook, and topped off with a superb catch from the crowd!

item.title: US wants Iran to pledge to stop shooting at ships in Strait of Hormuz
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: US media say Iran has told US officials an attack on ships crossing the strait early this week was "a mistake".

item.title: Shock in South African football as Jayden Adams dies at 25 few days after playing at World Cup
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The football community in South Africa and beyond has continued to pay tribute to the talented midfielder, remembering his contributions to the national team and the sport.

item.title: McCaul Backs Deeper US Ukraine Defense Ties
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Rep. Michael McCaul says Ukraine is gaining momentum on the battlefield but urgently needs more Patriot interceptors and stronger air defenses to counter Russia's escalating missile attacks. He urges deeper US-Ukraine defense cooperation, including licensed Patriot production and joint drone develop

item.title: Why rescued Oyo pupils are yet to rejoin their families — Makinde
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Governor Seyi Makinde of Oyo State has said the rescued schoolchildren and teachers from Oriire Local Government Area will remain in military custody for medical attention and routine screening. The post Why rescued Oyo pupils are yet to rejoin their families — Makinde appeared first on The Sun Nige

item.title: Overnight Russian missile and drone strikes on Ukraine kill six, officials say
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Russian attacks on Ukraine killed six people, including a child, and wounded dozens more, according to local officials on Saturday. Moscow launched more than 120 drones and 12 missiles during the night, according to Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky, putting his country's air defence system und

item.title: Only 5% of U.S. adults can ace this 8-question financial-literacy test. Can you?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Financial literacy just hit a 10-year low — and it is devastating bank accounts.

item.title: World Cup: ‘He can’t stop Haaland’ – Sam Allardyce tells Tuchel to drop England star against Norway
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Former England manager Sam Allardyce has advised Thomas Tuchel to drop Marc Guehi, a teammate of Erling Haaland at Manchester City, from the lineup for the quarter-final match of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. In an interview with Metro, Allardyce emphasized that Guehi should not be tasked with marking th

item.dc:creator: France 24

item.description: Charles Ajunwa The Nigerian Institute of Public Relations and the Nigerian Tourism Development Authority (NTDA) have officially launched the World Public Relations Forum 2026 Technical Committee at the NTDA headquarters

item.title: Benue Police Arrest Seven More Suspects Over Killing Of MACBAN Chairman
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Benue State Police Command has arrested seven more suspects, including an 80-year-old man, over the killing of the state chairman of the Miyetti Allah Cattle Breeders Association of Nigeria (MACBAN), Alhaji Ardo Risku Mohammed. The latest arrests bring the total number of suspects in custody to

item.title: Trump administration subpoenas New York Times journalists over Air Force One reporting
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: The reporters received the legal summons after they reported on alleged security issues with the president's new plane, which was gifted by Qatar.

item.title: Photos: Makinde meets rescued Oriire victims at military hospital
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Governor Seyi Makinde of Oyo State, in the company of a senior medical officer in the Nigerian Army, Brigadier General Moses Azuoru, on Saturday visited the rescued Oriire kidnap victims at the 2nd Division medical centre where they have been receiving treatment after their release. The post Photos:

item.title: Makinde Visits Rescued Victims Of Orire Abduction
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: Governor Seyi Makinde disclosed that all 39 pupils and five of the seven abducted teachers had been rescued. The post Makinde Visits Rescued Victims Of Orire Abduction appeared first on Channels Television.

item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Ondo State Governor, Lucky Aiyedatiwa has held met with President and Founder of the Dangote Group, Aliko Dangote, to advance discussions on the development of the Olokola Free Trade Zone (FTZ). The meeting, which took place in Lagos on Saturday, forms part of ongoing engagements between the Ondo St

item.title: Kogi: Bandits abduct corpse, mourners, demand N450 ransom
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Armed men suspected to be kidnappers have reportedly abducted the remains of a late Deputy Corps Commander of the Federal Road Safety Corps (FRSC), Augustine O. Ikwue, including the mourners accompanying him to his hometown at Otukpo in Benue state . The vehicle conveying the corpse ran into ambush

item.title: How Boko Haram uses AI to build bombs — Report reveals
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: A new report has revealed how Boko Haram is increasingly turning to Artificial Intelligence tools to build explosive devices to terrorise Nigerian society. According to a report published by The New York Times on Friday, findings suggest that terrorists are using AI-powered chatbots to obtain i

item.title: South African World Cup star dies At 25
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: South Africa midfielder, Jayden Adams has died aged 25, less than two weeks after representing Bafana Bafana at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The post South African World Cup star dies At 25 appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: UK reaffirms Nigerians, citizens of over 100 countries require visas for visits under six months
item.dc:creator: ICIR Nigeria
item.description: THE United Kingdom has reaffirmed that Nigerian citizens and nationals of over 100 other countries must obtain a visa before travelling to the UK for visits or any form of stay. The requirement is contained in the updated Immigration Rules Appendix Visitor, published by the UK Home Office, which lis

item.description: Former Chelsea midfielder, John Obi Mikel, has backed Spain to reach the final of the 2026 World Cup ahead of France. The former Nigerian international believes Spain can trouble France, adding that they have a chance to make it to the World Cup final. Obi Mikel spoke on Fox Sports after Spain elimi

item.dc:creator: Completesports

Inter announced the signing in a statement released on their official website on Saturday. “Internazionale Milano announces the arrival of Antionette Oyedupe “Toni” Payne at the Nerazzurri.

item.title: Wolves Turn Down Fiorentina Bid For Arokodare

Romano also disclosed that Turkish Super Lig outfit Trabzonspor have submitted a proposal for the forward, but the player is not intere

item.title: Navy Chief Says US Needs More Warships
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Chief of Naval Operations Adm. Daryl Caudle says the US Navy needs a larger fleet, faster shipbuilding and expanded munitions production to meet growing global demands while sustaining readiness across multiple theaters. He says the service remains prepared despite heavy operational commitments, poi

item.title: Angela Okorie Calls For ‘Copycat Police’ Over Alleged Imitation By Nollywood Colleagues
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Nollywood actress Angela Okorie has claimed that several of her colleagues have made a habit of copying her style, prompting her to jokingly call for a “copycat police” in the movie industry. In a series of posts shared on her Instagram Story, the actress alleged that many entertainers have imitated

item.title: NSE Launches 2026 National Engineering Games To Promote Fitness, Unity Among Engineers
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Nigerian Society of Engineers (NSE) has officially launched the 2026 National Engineering Games in Abuja, reaffirming its commitment to promoting healthy living, professional networking and unity among engineers across the country. Declaring the competition open on Saturday, NSE President, Engr.

item.title: Ryu makes history at Amundi Evian Championship with record-breaking round
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Haeran Ryu makes history after shooting the lowest-ever round in a men's or women's major at the Amundi Evian Championship.

item.description: The Labour Party (LP) has chosen Hajja Bintu Konto as running mate for its presidential candidate, Dr Chibuzo Okereke. item.description: South Africa and Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder Jayden Adams has died at the age of 25, just weeks after featuring for his country at the World Cup, BBC Sport reports. Adams featured in all three of South Africa’s group games at the tournament, where they reached the knockout stages before losin

item.title: ‎Influencer Model Plunges To Her Death From 27th Floor Of Dubai Skyscraper
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: ‎‎A newly engaged influencer mysteriously fell to her death from the 27th floor of a Dubai skyscraper. ‎‎Kauana Bilhar, 27, of Brazil, recently travelled to the United Arab Emirates, where she fatally fell from a high-rise, her mother, Darla Bilhar, confirmed in a heartbreaking social media post. ‎‎

item.title: 2027: LP unveils Hajja Bintu Konto as Vice Presidential candidate

Hajja Konto is to run alongside the Presidential Candidate, Dr. Chibuzo Okereke, on the Labour Party ti

item.title: US Iran Talks Face Persistent Impasse
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Bloomberg Economics analysts Becca Wasser and Dina Esfandiary say the US and Iran remain far apart on key issues, with intermittent strikes and negotiations likely to define the conflict for the foreseeable future. They say technical talks on Iran's nuclear program are a constructive step, but dispu

item.description: The Kwara State Chapter of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) has congratulated the Government and people of Oyo State on the successful rescue of the 49 abducted school children and teachers, who regained their freedom after spending 56 days in the kidnappers' captivity. item.description: Governor Umaru Bago said Niger State, despite generating about 60% of Nigeria's electricity and boasting vast land and mineral resources, has been inadequately compensated under the country's revenue-sharing formula. item.title: Soludo appoints US-trained doctor as SA on state HIV diaspora coordination, devt
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Anambra State Government has announced the appointment of United States-based infectious disease specialist, Prof. Chinelo Ngozi Animalu, The post Soludo appoints US-trained doctor as SA on state HIV diaspora coordination, devt appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Klopp reaches ‘understanding’ to take over as Germany coach
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The German Football Federation (DFB) announced on Saturday that it was close to an agreement with Jurgen Klopp for him to become the new Germany coach. The post Klopp reaches ‘understanding’ to take over as Germany coach appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: ABSU Inaugurates Search Team for Substantive Vice Chancellor
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Boniface OKoro in Umuahia The search for substantive Vice Chancellor for Abia State University, Uturu (ABSU), has begun. ABSU’s Pro-Chancellor and Chairman of the Governing Council, Dr. Agwu U. Agwu, inaugurated

item.title: 11 wounded in overnight Russian missile and drone strikes on Kyiv
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: At least 11 people, including a child, were wounded after Russia launched an overnight missile and drone attack on Kyiv early Saturday, according to Ukraine’s State Emergency Service.

item.title: Kwara PDP asks govt to rescue 176 abductees of Kaiama commumity
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Kwara State Chapter of the Peoples Democratic Party, PDP, has tasked the state government to rescue the 176 abductees of Kaiama community. The party congratulated the Government and people of Oyo State on the successful rescue of the 49 abducted school children and teachers, who regained their f

item.title: NIPOST, NIMC partner to integrate digital identity, address systems
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: The Nigerian Postal Service (NIPOST) and the National Identity Management Commission (NIMC) have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to read more NIPOST, NIMC partner to integrate digital identity, address systems

item.title: Britain's Patten wins second Wimbledon doubles title and hits out at proposed cuts
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Britain's Henry Patten and Finland's Harri Heliovaara won their second Wimbledon men's doubles title with a straight-sets victory.

item.title: Klopp agrees to replace Nagelsmann as Germany coach
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Jurgen Klopp agrees a deal in principle to become the new head coach of Germany's men's national team after the resignation of Julian Nagelsmann.

item.title: First Lady calls for accurate population database for effective planning
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: …urges Nigerians to embrace the NIN initiative First Lady, Oluremi Tinubu, has identified accurate population database as strong prerequisite for read more First Lady calls for accurate population database for effective planning

item.title: PRP Gives Bauchi Govt 3 Days to Remove APM Campaign Posters on Public Structures
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: The Bauchi State chapter of the Peoples Redemption Party (PRP) has given the state government a three-day ultimatum to remove posters and other campaign materials belonging to the ruling Allied Peoples Movement (APM) from public infrastructure across the state or face legal action. The Bauchi State

item.title: South Africa World Cup midfielder Adams dies aged 25
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: South Africa and Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder Jayden Adams dies at the age of 25, just weeks after featuring for his country at the World Cup.

item.title: Makinde Promises Medical Care During Visit to Rescued Oriire Kidnap Victim
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, on Saturday visited the pupils and teachers rescued from captivity after their abduction in Oriire Local Government Area, assuring that they would receive comprehensive medical and psychological care before reuniting with their families. The governor spoke after vis

item.title: Kwara PDP Hails Rescue Of Oyo School Children, Teachers
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Slams Gov AbdulRazaq’s nonchalance on rescue of 179 Woro abductees The Kwara State Chapter of the People’s Democratic Party (PDP) has congratulated the Government and people of Oyo State on the successful rescue of the 49 abducted school children and teachers, who regained their freedom

item.title: Ryu shoots lowest-ever round in a major at Evian Championship
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Haeran Ryu shot the lowest round in major championship history at the Amundi Evian Championship, carding 60 on Saturday to soar into a three-shot lead heading into the final round.
